report_name: Belgium Becomes First EU Member to Enforce NIS2 Cybersecurity Audit Deadline

identities.name: European Union
identities.description: A political and economic union that created the NIS2 Directive to establish a higher common level of cybersecurity across its member states.

identities.name: Centre for Cybersecurity Belgium (CCB)
identities.description: The national authority in Belgium responsible for authorizing bodies, accredited by BELAC, to conduct NIS2 conformity assessments.

identities.name: BELAC
identities.description: The Belgian Accreditation Body that accredits organizations to perform NIS2 cybersecurity audits.

identities.name: Essential Entities
identities.description: A classification under the NIS2 Directive for organizations in critical sectors like energy, transport, health, and digital infrastructure, which are subject to the strictest compliance and auditing requirements.

identities.name: Important Entities
identities.description: A classification under the NIS2 Directive for a broad category of organizations including postal services, waste management, manufacturing of critical products, and digital providers, which are also subject to compliance requirements.
